channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Nestlé turned a chocolate heist into a masterclass in brand building
item.description: After thieves stole a truckload of KitKats, Nestlé's marketing team responded with humor, showcasing European marketing savvy.

item.title: Food recall events hit a six-year year-over-year high, including Taco Bell lettuce and possible glass in Pillsbury rolls
item.description: A General Mills recall and a cyclospora outbreak linked to a Taco Bell supplier have raised consumer concerns about food safety.

item.title: 'Harvest now, decrypt later': Hackers steal unreadable data, betting on quantum computers to crack it
item.description: Everything you need to know before reaching the office this morning.

item.title: Retirees hoping to sell their homes face a hidden Medicare surcharge that could cost thousands
item.description: Selling a home near retirement may trigger a Medicare premium surcharge, catching many retirees off guard.
